news.summary: The individual responsible for a software program enabling users to deceive fitness apps such as Strava through fraudulent workout data is aiming to convey a broader message. "I believe I am addressing a significant issue," he stated.
news.headline: Developer creates tool to deceive Strava, aims to highlight larger issue; "Poking at a major problem," he said.

news.summary: Red Cell Partners, a venture capital firm focusing on developing quickly scalable technology companies in healthcare, cyber, and national security sectors, has recently disclosed that Admiral (Retired) John C. Aquilino, the former Commander of the United States Indo-Pacific Command, has come on board as an Advisor for its National Security Practice. This move highlights the firm's commitment to leveraging top talent in the field, with Admiral Aquilino bringing his expertise to the team. Red Cell is dedicated to fostering innovative solutions in these critical areas, with a strong emphasis on driving impactful change.
news.headline: Admiral John C. Aquilino, ex-commander of US INDOPACOM, joins Red Cell Partners as advisor in cybersecurity, healthcare innovation.

news.summary: After facing extensive delays due to air traffic control issues at Newark airport, United Airlines decided to establish a partnership with local authorities. Newark airport, which serves as a major hub for United Airlines, experienced significant disruptions impacting numerous flights and passengers. As a result, United Airlines has worked closely with the airport to address these challenges and improve operations moving forward.
news.headline: United Airlines to return to JFK via deal with JetBlue after delays at Newark airport due to air traffic control issues.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, a notable development has occurred as Acumatica, a reputable company offering cloud ERP solutions for small and medium-sized enterprises, has officially agreed to be acquired by Vista Equity Partners. Vista, a well-known global investment firm that specifically targets enterprise software, data, and technology-driven ventures, is the acquiring entity. Acumatica's ERP platform, which is cloud-based and designed for the mid-market segment, plays a crucial role in helping organizations efficiently handle and automate essential business functions. The agreement marks a significant milestone for both entities involved and underscores the growing importance of cloud-centric solutions in the business world.
news.headline: Acumatica acquired by Vista Equity Partners, a global investment firm. Acumatica offers cloud ERP solutions for small & mid-sized businesses.

news.summary: Denver-based CoreSite, a subsidiary of American Tower Corporation (AMT), has published its 2025 State of the Data Center Report. The report, now in its sixth year, delves into current trends, strategies, and demands in data center and cloud computing. It reveals that business and IT executives are facing a landscape where digitization is becoming more crucial. CoreSite specializes in interconnected data center solutions that support critical business and AI workloads. The report is a comprehensive analysis that provides insights for navigating the evolving technological environment.
news.headline: CoreSite released its 2025 State of the Data Center Report stressing importance of colocation & connectivity for hybrid IT. #AMT #datacenter

news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, Stacklet, the developers and main caretakers of CNCF's Cloud Custodian project, have revealed the latest innovation in their platform. They have introduced AI-driven features that are a first in the industry. These enhancements are aimed at hastening cloud cost reduction by cutting down Mean Time to Savings (MTTS) and facilitating the implementation of preventive policies at a rate 6 times quicker than before. At the heart of this improvement is Jun0, Stacklet's AI assistant, which now provides a proactive experience that swiftly guides teams from recognizing trends to executing actions.
news.headline: Stacklet unveils AI agent Jun0 for cloud usage optimization, decreasing MTTS and enabling faster policy deployment 6x.

news.summary: A company called Cambium Assessment, Inc., under the Cambium Learning Group, which is a leading provider of digital assessments to over half of the US states, has revealed its strategy for rapid progress. They aim to introduce cutting-edge technology solutions for school districts and states. The company caters to the vast student base in the most populous states in the US, showcasing unmatched scalability and capacity when compared to other assessment providers.
news.headline: Cambium Assessment sets record in 2025, plans to expand impact in K-12 education with innovative tech solutions. Serving largest student population in US states. #EdTech #Innovation.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, ChargerHelp, a specialist in EV charger dependability, has joined forces with Epic Charging, a top EV charging software company, to introduce the first comprehensive operations and maintenance (O&M) management solution in the industry. This partnership aims to address a critical issue in the EV sector: charger downtime. According to J.D. Power's Q4 2024 report, 1 out of every 5 EV drivers faced challenges completing a charge at public stations. This collaboration is set to revolutionize how reliability and maintenance are handled in the EV charging realm.
news.headline: ChargerHelp and Epic Charging partner to launch industry's first integrated EV charger O&M management solution in Q4 2024.

news.summary: Render Networks, a prominent network construction management software provider based in Denver, has recently revealed an innovative integration with VETRO FiberMap. This collaboration, facilitated through the Render Connector platform, marks a significant development in how network operators handle and oversee as-built construction data. The integration's primary function is the automation of field-verified redlines from Render to VETRO's fiber management system, thus resulting in a more efficient process that minimizes errors and accelerates service activation timelines. This advancement is particularly beneficial for Irby's OSP team, showcased by the seamless daily utility of Render and VETRO's solutions in their operations.
news.headline: Render Networks integrates with VETRO FiberMap to enhance broadband deployment, reducing errors and speeding up service activation.

news.summary: A well-known consortium, the Consortium for State and Regional Interoperability (CSRI), which consists of major nonprofit health data networks in the United States, unveiled its newest member today - the New York eHealth Collaborative (NYeC). NYeC is a nonprofit entity dedicated to enhancing healthcare and patient results through the coordinated advancement, connection, and incorporation of health information exchange (HIE) within New York State. This addition boosts CSRI's roster of founding members and strengthens its network.
news.headline: CSRI adds NYeC as newest member, boosting healthcare data exchange in NY state.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company ATX has recently released high-performance energy modules that provide voltage-specific flexibility and long-cycle reliability. These modules are designed to meet the demands of various energy needs and offer a durable solution for long-term use. The modules are equipped with state-of-the-art technology to ensure optimal performance and efficiency. With their advanced features, the ATX energy modules are set to make a significant impact in the energy industry.
news.headline: ATX Networks launching new Areca™ Hybrid Supercapacitor Group 31 Modules at Fiber Connect 2025, promising reliability.

news.summary: FuboTV Inc. disclosed today that they are introducing programmatic pause ads, making them the premier sports-oriented live TV streaming service. Noteworthy is their distinction as the pioneer Connected TV platform to present this ad style in a programmatic biddable setup. The initiative is facilitated through ClearLine, Magnite’s self-service purchasing tool. Fubo is now equipped to accommodate both programmatic guaranteed (PG) and biddable private marketplace (PMP) pause ad strategies. This innovative move allows advertisers to capitalize on the opportunities for increased...
news.headline: FuboTV launches programmatic pause ads on CTV, first of its kind. Ad format offered in biddable environment. Powered by ClearLine.

news.summary: Arrow Electronics, a global technology solutions provider based in Centennial, Colorado, was honored with two significant accolades by Dell Technologies: the 2025 OEM Solutions Partner of the Year and the 2025 North America Distributor of the Year. These awards were presented at Dell Technologies World, which took place in Las Vegas towards the end of May. This recognition highlights the strong collaboration between Arrow Electronics and Dell Technologies, showcasing their joint dedication to fostering innovation and supporting mid-market channel partners.
news.headline: Arrow Electronics wins Partner of the Year awards from Dell Technologies: 2025 OEM Solutions, 2025 North America Distributor.

news.summary: In Wakefield, Massachusetts, the Alliance for Open Media (AOMedia) welcomed Pozalabs, an innovative music technology company leveraging artificial intelligence (AI). This addition marks a significant development for the Alliance, which now boasts a diverse membership base.
news.headline: Pozalabs, AI music tech company, joins Alliance for Open Media. 100 characters.

news.summary: In San Francisco and Philadelphia, biopharmaceutical companies typically achieve disease cures in animals through preclinical testing. However, a disheartening trend shows that these same treatments prove ineffective in human clinical trials almost 95% of the time. To address this issue, innovative biotech company Vivodyne has secured an impressive $40 million in fresh Series A funding. This investment will support the expansion of their revolutionary approach, which involves transitioning from animal models to a preclinical system exclusively focused on human optimization. Vivodyne intends to utilize robotics and artificial intelligence technologies to conduct tests on thousands of fully functional human tissues cultivated in labs, along with analyzing vast amounts of human data.
news.headline: Vivodyne secures $40M to replace animal testing, aiming to reverse 95% clinical trial failure rate by using robotics+AI on lab-grown tissues.

news.summary: Boston-based businesses are advancing their data analytics strategies with new features in automated modeling, GenAI integrations, and open semantic standards. These developments are shaping the future of enterprise analytics and setting the stage for enhanced efficiency and insights across industries.
news.headline: AtScale introduces innovations for AI and open source at 2025 Summit, setting new standards for analytics.

news.summary: A New Hartford, New York-based company, GoNetspeed, revealed their plan to expand their 100% fiber-optic internet network into another community in the state. With a $12 million investment, the company aims to reach over 9,200 homes and businesses in New Hartford. This expansion will offer ultrafast symmetrical upload and download speeds to the area. The construction for this project has already commenced in New Hartford.
news.headline: GoNetspeed expands to New Hartford, NY with $12M investment, offering fiber-optic network to 9,200 homes/businesses.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, a new series focusing on Cloud IAM has been launched to provide valuable knowledge and motivation to IAM professionals. This series offers practical insights and viewpoints on key topics such as modernization, Zero Trust, policy, and resilience. Aimed at empowering professionals in the field, the series aims to equip them with the necessary tools to navigate the evolving landscape of IAM.
news.headline: Strata Identity launches 'The Identity Heroes' series to educate IAM professionals with insights on modernization, Zero Trust, and resilience.

news.summary: Boston-based company Quickbase has made significant leadership appointments, naming Alys Reynders as Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) and Marcus Torres as Chief Product Officer (CPO). These additions highlight the company's aim to enhance its market approach and provide cutting-edge solutions that utilize AI and low code/no code to assist operations and IT teams in elevating everyday tasks into impactful outcomes. Alys Reynders will spearhead marketing efforts, while Marcus Torres will oversee product development.
news.headline: Quickbase appoints Alys Reynders as CMO and Marcus Torres as CPO to boost market presence and drive growth.

news.summary: EnCharge AI unveiled the EnCharge EN100, the first AI accelerator in the industry. This new technology utilizes precise and scalable analog in-memory computing. The EN100 is specifically designed to enhance AI capabilities in laptops, workstations, and edge devices. It boasts an impressive total compute power of over 200 TOPS while remaining within the power limitations of edge and client platforms like laptops. The EN100 signifies a significant change in AI computing architecture.
news.headline: EnCharge AI unveils EN100, first AI accelerator for on-device computing, delivering 200+ TOPS for edge and client platforms.
SOUTH AFRICA CUTS BENCHMARK RATE BY 50BPS TO 7%; EST. 7.25%

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 29, 2025, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a caution to consumers regarding Kmaier-branded infant swings. These swings, designed for infant sleep, have an incline angle exceeding 10 degrees, which goes against safety regulations. The CPSC advises consumers to discontinue using these swings to prevent any potential risks.
news.headline: Warning: Stop using Kmaier infant swings due to suffocation hazard. Violations include angle >10 degrees. CPSC alert issued.

news.summary: Valvoline Global is gearing up to enter a partnership with FIFA's main tournament for the first time. This sponsorship showcases the swift global growth of the United States' oldest engine oil brand as it nears its 160 years of operation. Valvoline Global plans to connect with fans through innovative retail initiatives, highlighting its milestone anniversary.
news.headline: Valvoline Global becomes official supporter of FIFA World Cup 26™ as brand nears 160th anniversary, engaging fans worldwide.

news.summary: SEI® disclosed today their upcoming participation at the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference in Chicago, IL. Sean Denham, SEI's Chief Financial and Chief Operating Officer, is scheduled to deliver a presentation at 10:20 a.m. ET on June 5. The company, listed on NASDAQ as SEIC, will be represented at this event that aims to foster growth opportunities.
news.headline: SEI to present at William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference on June 5 at 10:20 a.m. ET. Sean Denham speaking.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, on May 29, 2025, SquareX announced its latest findings on a sophisticated Browser-in-the-Middle (BitM) attack aimed at Safari users. The research revealed that adversaries are utilizing BitM attacks more frequently to extract credentials and unauthorized access.
news.headline: SquareX detected BitM attack in Safari, exploiting Fullscreen APIs for credential theft. Threat research highlighted by Mandiant.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, UNice Hair, a prominent beauty brand worldwide recognized for its creativity and support, announced a collaboration with Student Beans and Beans iD to introduce a special discount program. This program is tailored towards students, recent graduates, and essential workers, providing them with exclusive offers and benefits. The partnership aims to support these groups by offering discounts on UNice Hair products through Student Beans and Beans iD platforms.
news.headline: UNice Hair partners with Student Beans and Beans iD to offer exclusive discounts to students, grads, and key workers.

news.summary: Released on May 29, 2025, the ninth annual 401(k) Plan Benchmark Report by Judy Diamond Associates, a division of Touchpoint Markets, offers a comprehensive analysis of 27 industries. The report delves into more than 640,000 active 401(k) plans, providing valuable insights and benchmarks for organizations looking to optimize their retirement benefits offerings.
news.headline: Top financial professionals dominate on the Best 401(k) List. 640,000 active plans across 27 industries analyzed.

news.summary: Seattle-based company Omnidian, a top provider of protection and performance plans for solar and energy storage systems, named Evan Fein as its new Chief Financial Officer on May 29, 2025. Fein's appointment comes as the company aims to strengthen its financial leadership. Omnidian specializes in offering comprehensive plans for both residential and commercial solar assets.
news.headline: Omnidian names Evan Fein as CFO, a veteran finance leader. He will lead financial strategies for the solar company.

news.summary: Convergint seeks to enhance its end-to-end procurement processes by partnering with Ivalua and Deloitte. The collaboration aims to boost efficiency and visibility in procurement operations. Based in Redwood City, Calif., the announcement was made on May 29, 2025. Ivalua, a renowned player in spend management, will work with Deloitte to assist Convergint, a global systems company, in this transformation. This partnership is expected to improve Convergint's procurement processes significantly.
news.headline: Convergint teams up with Ivalua and Deloitte to automate procurement, enhancing efficiency and visibility.

news.summary: A company based in Redwood City, California, recently introduced enterprise object storage with integrated replication, extending S3 Express API performance to the entire data lakehouse. MinIO, renowned for high-performance object storage tailored for the exabyte AI era, unveiled their AIStorage solution on May 29, 2025. The new offering promises enhanced performance without additional charges, a significant development for businesses seeking efficient data management.
news.headline: MinIO introduces AIStor with AWS S3 Express API support, provides high performance for data lakehouse at no extra cost.

news.summary: In an unprecedented move at the Digital Finance Forum in Hamilton, Bermuda on May 29, 2025, industry giants Coinbase and Penrose Partners took a significant step towards promoting digital finance and onchain innovation. They successfully executed one of the earliest fully compliant stablecoin airdrops globally, benefiting the local community.
news.headline: Coinbase & Penrose Partners boost digital finance in Bermuda with stablecoin airdrops at Digital Finance Forum.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Hyperlink InfoSystem, a top IT services provider based in New York and Los Angeles, shared that it has achieved Maturity Level 3 in the Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) from the CMMI Institute. This milestone signifies the company's adherence to global standards for IT service quality and process improvement.
news.headline: Hyperlink InfoSystem achieves CMMI Level 3 Appraisal, a globally recognized milestone for IT services provider.

news.summary: A recently released handbook provides tactics for maximizing the impact of nano- and micro-influencers to enhance return on investment and build brand credibility within the competitive online realm. The guide was launched in Austin, Texas on May 29, 2025. Orange 142, a subset of Direct Digital Holdings trading on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol DRCT, spearheaded this initiative. The company is renowned for its expertise in digital marketing strategies.
news.headline: Orange 142 provides micro-influencer marketing strategies to enhance ROI & brand trust in digital space.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, MatrixPoint revealed its participation in HubSpot's Solutions Partner Program. HubSpot, a platform for expanding businesses, collaborates with partner professionals to enhance their businesses with inbound software, services.
news.headline: MatrixPoint partners with HubSpot to grow businesses through inbound software and services, effective May 29, 2025.

news.summary: A membership in a network of diverse locations including farms, wineries, breweries, museums, golf courses, restaurants, and roadhouses allows RV owners to enjoy affordable stays. This network offers special rates for Family RV Association members, providing access to a variety of host locations for overnight stays.
news.headline: Family RV Association partners with RV Overnights, offering exclusive access to host locations like farms, wineries, museums, and more, at a discounted rate for members.

news.summary: A recent study by Wordly, a prominent provider of live AI translation services, uncovered significant barriers hindering government initiatives to cater to multilingual communities. The 2025 State of Language Access in Government report, released on May 29th in Los Altos, California, sheds light on the challenges faced by governments. Budget constraints and logistical issues emerged as key obstacles, preventing effective service delivery to diverse language groups. This study brings attention to the urgent need for strategic solutions to address language barriers, with critical implications for over 2025.
news.headline: AI by Wordly aids to fill language gap; Study finds budget & logistics hurdles in govt serving multilingual communities.

news.summary: The music group James River Worship from James River Church recently launched their impactful new song "Defender," with vocals by Annie Casler. This release serves as a strong declaration of faith and optimism in anticipation of their upcoming live worship album. The announcement was made in Springfield, Missouri on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: James River Church releases new single "Defender" featuring Annie Casler ahead of live worship album.

news.summary: Eco-Products has signed on as the Official Zero Waste Partner of the San Francisco Giants, providing compostable products to assist Oracle Park's waste diversion program. The collaboration, announced on May 29, 2025, aims to support the award-winning program by offering environmentally friendly alternatives. This partnership signifies a significant step towards sustainability, enhancing the Giants' efforts in waste management. With this initiative, Eco-Products aims to contribute to reducing waste at Oracle Park and promoting eco-friendly practices.
news.headline: Eco-Products partners with San Francisco Giants to provide compostable products for Oracle Park's waste diversion program.

news.summary: In May 29, 2025, Juno Health based in Juno Beach, Florida, a prominent healthcare innovation and digital transformation organization, announced a strategic partnership with Multiview Financial Software, one of the top providers of enterprise resource planning software for healthcare. This partnership aims to enhance healthcare services and streamline operations for businesses in the industry.
news.headline: Juno Health and Multiview Financial Software partner to revolutionize healthcare finance management in 2025.

news.summary: Wahl Professional's innovative platform, 'Make it With Wahl,' has transformed into a storytelling tool for the next generation of professionals. Established in Sterling, Illinois, on May 29, 2025, Wahl Professional, with a legacy of over a century, has been a benchmark for barbers and groomers globally. Their platform caters to emerging professionals, emphasizing creativity and skill development.
news.headline: Wahl Professional launches new 'Make it With Wahl' campaign, empowering barbers; over 100 years of setting industry standards.

news.summary: The GENIUS Act is a US stablecoin legislation awaiting full Senate vote, aiming to regulate stablecoin collateralization and ensure compliance with Anti-Money Laundering laws. Backed by a 1:1 ratio to the US dollar, it strengthens the dollar's role in the digital economy. The bill passed a Senate procedural vote by a 66-32 margin on May 20, paving the way for potential global crypto regulations. The Act sets guidelines to prevent misappropriation of stablecoin reserves and restricts their use to redemption and safe investments only. This legislation could impact the evolving digital asset economy significantly.
news.headline: GENIUS Act could lock US dollar's digital dominance with 1:1 backing, $2.3B profit loss in Bitcoin sale, passed Senate vote 66-32. Act might lead to global crypto rules. Source emphasizes stability in Web3 economy, awaiting final floor vote.

news.summary: BitMEX introduced the SOPHUSDT perpetual swap listings for traders, enabling them to leverage up to 50 times. This new addition to their trading options began on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: BitMEX introduces SOPHUSDT perpetual swaps, offering 50x leverage. Trading started on May 29, 2025.

The Chinese envoy to the UN urged for an immediate and lasting ceasefire in Gaza during a meeting on Wednesday. Fu Cong, China’s permanent representative to the UN, stressed at a UN Security Council meeting the urgency of ceasefire and easing the humanitarian disaster happening

news.summary: In Toronto, Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) revealed an extension of its partnership with Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM) to include Canada, alongside their existing collaboration in the U.S. This expansion enables Canadian consumers to utilize Affirm's payment network when shopping at Williams-Sonoma, Inc.’s various brands such as Williams Sonoma, West Elm, Pottery Barn, Pottery Barn Teen, Pottery Barn Kids, and Mark & Graham. This partnership aims to assist merchants in boosting growth through facilitating consumer purchases, catering to the increasing demand for flexible payment options in the retail sector.
news.headline: Affirm partners with Williams-Sonoma, Inc. in Canada, expanding beyond U.S., targeting Canadian shoppers.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, Appriss Retail, a prominent company offering solutions to prevent returns and claims fraud, has promoted Vishal Patel to the role of chief product and technology officer (CPTO). This move signifies Appriss Retail's strategic positioning for rapid expansion and enhanced product development to benefit its clientele. Patel's responsibilities will involve overseeing the company's product development, engineering, infrastructure, cloud engineering, and operations as it gears up for future growth and innovation.
news.headline: Vishal Patel promoted to CPTO at Appriss Retail, to lead product & tech ops for accelerated growth.

news.summary: A company known as David, specializing in creating products to build muscle and reduce fat, has recently concluded a Series A funding round in New York. The funding totaled $75 million and was primarily backed by Greenoaks, along with support from Valor Equity Partners. The brand made waves in September 2024 with the introduction of its premier offering: a protein bar containing 28 grams of protein, no sugar, and only 150 calories. This product boasts the highest protein-to-calorie ratio available in the market. In the initial eight months of retail, David has witnessed remarkable expansion.
news.headline: David secures $75M in Series A funding; launches protein bar with 28g protein, 0 sugar, 150 cal. in 2024 for growth.

news.summary: Gaffney, South Carolina - Prime Line recently revealed plans to expand its facility in Gaffney, SC to bolster business operations, consequently generating employment opportunities in the area.
news.headline: Prime Line expands by 100,000 sq. ft. in Gaffney, SC, for operational enhancement and job growth in the region.

news.summary: In San Diego, MANSCAPED® has announced its debut in Harrods, a renowned luxury department store with over 1 million square feet of retail space and 330 departments on Brompton Road since 1849. Harrods now features MANSCAPED's men's grooming items as part of its offerings. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for the brand's expansion in the UK market.
news.headline: Global men's grooming company, MANSCAPED®, launches in Harrods, the famed luxury department store, expanding UK presence.

news.summary: In New York, SecurityScorecard unveiled the availability of SecurityScorecard MAX, their supply chain cybersecurity risk management engine, for purchase on the CrowdStrike Marketplace. MAX offers organizations the necessary visibility, threat intelligence, and real-time insights required to actively oversee cybersecurity risk within direct third-party vendors, as well as throughout additional layers of the supplier network, handling relationships up to 4th-party and nth-party connections.
news.headline: SecurityScorecard's MAX supply chain cyber risk management engine is now available in CrowdStrike Marketplace, offering visibility and threat intelligence across supplier ecosystem.

news.summary: C.H. Robinson, based in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, has recently launched a new self-serve tariff analysis tool. This tool allows shippers to analyze tariffs independently, helping them manage costs and navigate market fluctuations effectively. This initiative aims to empower shippers by providing them with a tool to make informed decisions. Through this tool, shippers can take control of their shipping expenses and adapt to changing market conditions.
news.headline: C.H. Robinson introduces self-serve tariff analysis tool for shippers to manage costs and market volatility.
